item.title: Academic Calendar
item.description:

First Semester

Event Date
Classes Begin November 2025
Mid-term Exams January 2026

Event Date
Classes Resume March 2026
Final Exams June 2026
Results Announcement July 2026

  • Eid al-Adha

item.title: Accessibility
item.description:
Accessibility Statement

Al-Qadisiyah University is committed to making its website accessible to all users.

Our Commitments

  • Design compliant with WCAG 2.1 standards
  • Screen reader support
  • Appropriate color contrast
  • Alternative text for images
  • Keyboard navigation

Assistance

If you encounter any accessibility difficulties:

  • Email: accessibility@qu.edu.iq
  • Phone: +964 780 000 0000

Report an Issue

We welcome your feedback to improve accessibility.

item.title: Accessing the Student Portal
item.description:
Student Portal (SIS)

The Student Portal is the official Student Information System used by Al-Qadisiyah University and all Iraqi universities. It is centrally managed by the Ministry of Higher Education and Scientific Research.

🔗 Portal URL: sis.mohesr.gov.iq

What You Can Do in the Portal

  • 📊 View your semester and final grades
  • 📅 See your weekly timetable
  • 📝 Check exam results
  • 📈 Track your cumulative academic record (GPA, credit hours)
  • 💳 View tuition fees and payment receipts
  • 📋 Submit re-examination and study-postponement requests
  • 🎓 Apply for graduation forms and ratification

First-Time Login

  1. Go to sis.mohesr.gov.iq
  2. Use your university ID number as the username (provided by your department)
  3. Default password: your university ID + year of birth (you will be prompted to change it on first login)
  4. Update your personal information and password

Forgot Your Password?

Use the “Forgot password” link inside the portal. If you do not receive a verification email, contact your college’s Registration Office.

item.title: Admission Plans
item.description:
Admission Plan for Academic Year 2025-2026

Capacity by College

College Morning Studies Evening Studies
Medicine 200 -
Dentistry 100 -
Pharmacy 150 -
Engineering 400 200
Science 350 150
Computer Science 300 150
Law 250 200
Education 500 250
Administration & Economics 400 300
Arts 350 200
Physical Education 200 100
Agriculture 250 -
Veterinary Medicine 100 -
Nursing 150 -

Total Capacity: ~6,000 students

New Specializations

The following specializations have been introduced for the current academic year:

item.title: Admission Requirements
item.description:
Admission Requirements

General Requirements

  1. Iraqi Preparatory Certificate or equivalent
  2. Meeting required average for college and major
  3. Passing medical examination (for health colleges)
  4. No disciplinary dismissal from another university

Required Documents

  • Original graduation certificate with certified copy
  • Civil Status ID
  • National Card
  • Iraqi Nationality Certificate
  • Recent passport photos (6 photos)

Admission Averages

College Scientific Literary
Medicine 98+ -
Engineering 85+ -
Science 70+ -
Law - 75+

Averages are approximate and vary annually

item.title: Admission Requirements
item.description:
Overview

Al-Qadisiyah University welcomes all students wishing to join our academic journey. The university follows centralized admission standards approved by the Ministry of Higher Education and Scientific Research.

General Admission Requirements

For Morning Studies

  1. Obtain Iraqi Preparatory School Certificate or equivalent
  2. Achieve the required average according to college and major
  3. Pass medical examination (for health colleges)
  4. No disciplinary dismissal from another university

For Evening Studies

  1. Same requirements as morning studies
  2. Required averages differ from morning studies

Previous Admission Averages

College Scientific Branch Literary Branch
Medicine 98+ -
Engineering 85+ -
Science 70+ -
Law - 75+
Education 65+ 65+
Administration & Economics 60+ 60+

Note: Above averages are indicative and change annually based on capacity

item.title: Alumni Affairs
item.description:
Alumni Affairs

Al-Qadisiyah University maintains communication with its graduates and supports them in their professional journey.

Alumni Services

Alumni Database

  • Graduate data registration
  • Contact information updates
  • Career path tracking

Employment Opportunities

  • Job announcements from partner companies
  • Annual job fairs
  • Academic recommendations and references

Professional Development

  • Workshops and training courses
  • Career counseling programs
  • Continuing education opportunities

Certificates and Documents

  • Certificate copies
  • Document authentication
  • Official transcripts

Alumni Network

Join the Al-Qadisiyah University alumni network to connect with peers and exchange experiences and opportunities.

item.description:
Alumni Network

item.title: Business Incubators
item.description:
Al-Qadisiyah University Business Incubator

The Al-Qadisiyah University Business Incubator helps transform research and creative ideas into successful commercial ventures, and connects graduates with opportunities in industry and services.

Services

For students and graduates

  • Entrepreneurship workshops and training
  • Mentoring and support in developing business models
  • Co-working spaces
  • Seed funding for selected projects

For startups

  • 6–12 months of hosting and funding
  • Mentoring from experts and specialised coaches
  • Access to university laboratories and equipment
  • A network of industrial partners

Tracks

Technology & AI

In partnership with the College of Computer Science and Information Technology.

item.title: Career Opportunities
item.description:
Career Opportunities

Various job opportunities available for university graduates.

  • careers@qu.edu.iq

item.title: Career Opportunities
item.description:
Available Career Opportunities

Al-Qadisiyah University aims to connect its graduates with the job market by publishing available employment opportunities.

Current Job Announcements

Government Positions

Organization Position Required Major Deadline
Ministry of Health Resident Physician General Medicine 2026/02/28
Ministry of Education Secondary Teacher Science, Mathematics 2026/03/15
Ministry of Higher Education Teaching Assistant All Majors Open

Private Sector Positions

Company Position Required Major Deadline
Tech Company Software Developer Computer Science 2026/02/15
Private Hospital Pharmacist Pharmacy 2026/02/20
Engineering Firm Civil Engineer Civil Engineering 2026/03/01

Training Programs

Summer Training Program

The university, in cooperation with the private sector, offers summer training programs for students including:

item.title: Contact Us
item.description:
Contact Information

Address

Al-Qadisiyah University
Al-Diwaniyah, Al-Qadisiyah Province
Iraq

Phone

  • Main Line: +964 780 000 0000
  • Fax: +964 36 224 1400

Email

  • General Inquiries: info@qu.edu.iq
  • Admissions: admission@qu.edu.iq
  • Student Affairs: students@qu.edu.iq
  • Technical Support: support@qu.edu.iq

Working Hours

  • Sunday - Thursday: 8:00 AM - 3:00 PM
  • Friday & Saturday: Closed

Contact Form

To contact us, please fill out the form below and we will respond as soon as possible.

The contact form is not currently enabled. Please email us directly at: info@qu.edu.iq

item.title: Course Catalog
item.description:
Course Catalog

You can view courses for each academic program through college websites.

Search Courses

To search for a specific course, please visit the relevant college website.

For Assistance

  • academics@qu.edu.iq

item.title: Data Protection
item.description:
Data Protection Policy

Al-Qadisiyah University is committed to protecting personal data of all users according to international standards.

Data Protection Principles

  1. Transparency - Informing users how their data is used
  2. Minimization - Collecting only necessary data
  3. Accuracy - Maintaining data accuracy and updates
  4. Security - Protecting data from unauthorized access

Data Subject Rights

  • Right to access data
  • Right to rectification
  • Right to erasure
  • Right to restrict processing
  • Right to data portability

Contact

  • Data Protection Officer: dpo@qu.edu.iq

item.description:

item.title: Graduate Tracking
item.description:
Graduate Tracking System

Al-Qadisiyah University aims to track its graduates and maintain continuous communication to evaluate educational quality and connect them with employment opportunities.

Graduate Survey

All graduates are kindly requested to complete the following survey to help us improve our academic programs and track your career progress.

The graduate survey is not currently enabled. To participate, please email us at: info@qu.edu.iq

Statistics

Indicator Percentage
Employment within one year 75%
Working in field of study 68%
Employer satisfaction 85%
Pursuing postgraduate studies 22%

Contact

  • Email: alumni@qu.edu.iq
  • Phone: +964 780 000 0000

item.title: Handbooks & Guides
item.description:
Official Handbooks

Al-Qadisiyah University publishes a set of handbooks organising academic and administrative work and clarifying rights and responsibilities for all members of the university community.

Student Handbook

Everything a university student needs to know about:

  • Registration and academic advising
  • The examination system, pass criteria, and promotion
  • Student discipline and the code of conduct
  • Co-curricular activities, libraries, and student services
  • Grievance and complaints procedures

📄 Download Student Handbook 2024–2025

Faculty Handbook

Covers:

item.title: Historical Overview
item.description:
University Establishment

Al-Qadisiyah University was established in 1987 as one of Iraq’s public universities. The university started with a limited number of colleges and scientific departments, then gradually expanded to include 18 colleges covering various scientific and humanities disciplines.

Development Phases

Phase One (1987-1995)

  • Establishment of core colleges (Education, Arts, Science)
  • Building the initial university infrastructure
  • Recruiting distinguished teaching staff

Phase Two (1995-2005)

  • Opening Medicine, Engineering, and Law colleges
  • Developing laboratories and libraries
  • Expanding graduate programs

Phase Three (2005-2015)

  • Establishing new colleges (Pharmacy, Dentistry, Nursing)
  • Updating curricula according to international standards
  • Enhancing international cooperation with global universities

Current Phase (2015-Present)

  • Developing digital infrastructure
  • Adopting blended e-learning
  • Pursuing international academic accreditations

Achievements

  • Graduating more than 100,000 students since establishment
  • Publishing thousands of research papers in peer-reviewed journals
  • Achieving advanced positions in international rankings

item.title: Honor Roll
item.description:
Honor Roll for Academic Year 2024-2025

We are proud of our outstanding students who have achieved academic excellence across various colleges.

Top Students University-Wide

First Stage

Rank Name College GPA
1 Ahmed Mohammed Ali College of Medicine 96.5%
2 Fatima Hussein Kareem College of Pharmacy 95.8%
3 Ali Abdullah Hassan College of Engineering 95.2%

Final Stage

Rank Name College GPA
1 Zainab Ahmed Mohammed College of Medicine 94.7%
2 Mohammed Saeed Jasim College of Dentistry 93.9%
3 Noor Ali Kadhim College of Engineering 93.5%

Top Students by College

College of Medicine

  • First: Zainab Ahmed Mohammed - 94.7%
  • Second: Ahmed Ali Hussein - 93.2%
  • Third: Sarah Mohammed Abdullah - 92.8%

College of Engineering

  • First: Noor Ali Kadhim - 93.5%
  • Second: Hussein Mohammed Ahmed - 92.1%
  • Third: Yasmin Saeed Kareem - 91.7%

College of Science

  • First: Maryam Hassan Ali - 92.3%
  • Second: Omar Ahmed Mohammed - 91.5%
  • Third: Ruqaya Ali Hussein - 90.8%

College of Computer Science

  • First: Ali Mohammed Kadhim - 94.1%
  • Second: Huda Saeed Ahmed - 93.3%
  • Third: Hussein Ali Jasim - 92.6%

Excellence Recognition Program

The university offers outstanding students:

item.title: Important Links
item.description:

  • Scholarships and Cultural Relations Department

Other Government Bodies

  • Prime Minister’s Office
  • Ministry of Education
  • General Secretariat of Council of Ministers

Student Platforms

Electronic Portals

  • Student Portal - Student Information System
  • E-Library - Library System
  • Digital Repository - Research and Theses
  • E-Learning Platform - Learning Management System

Other Services

  • University Email
  • Intranet

Iraqi Universities

Middle Euphrates Region

  • University of Babylon
  • University of Kerbala
  • University of Kufa

Other Universities

  • University of Baghdad
  • University of Mosul
  • University of Basrah
  • Middle Technical University

International Organizations

Education Organizations

  • UNESCO
  • World Bank - Education

University Rankings

  • Webometrics
  • QS World Rankings
  • Times Higher Education

Scientific Databases

Publishers and Repositories

  • Scopus
  • Google Scholar
  • ResearchGate

Note: All external links open in a new window and are not the responsibility of Al-Qadisiyah University.

item.title: Innovation & Incubator
item.description:
Innovation & Entrepreneurship

Business Incubator

The university supports entrepreneurs among students and graduates.

Programs

  • Startup support program

  • Entrepreneurship workshops

  • Seed funding

  • innovation@qu.edu.iq

item.title: International Students
item.description:
International Students - Study in Iraq

Al-Qadisiyah University welcomes international students from around the world.

Study in Iraq Program

A government program to attract international students to study at Iraqi universities.

Benefits

  • Competitive tuition fees
  • University accommodation
  • Student visa
  • Academic support

Required Documents

  • Valid passport
  • Certified academic certificates
  • Health certificate
  • Passport photos

Application Steps

  1. Register via Study in Iraq Portal
  2. Choose university and program
  3. Submit documents
  4. Receive conditional acceptance
  5. Complete visa procedures

Contact

  • Email: international@qu.edu.iq

item.title: Leadership
item.description:
Al-Qadisiyah University Leadership

University President

Professor Dr. [President Name]

President of Al-Qadisiyah University

  • Email: president@qu.edu.iq

Position Name
Vice President for Scientific Affairs Prof. Dr. [Name]
Vice President for Administrative Affairs Prof. Dr. [Name]
Vice President for Student Affairs Prof. Dr. [Name]

University Council

The University Council includes:

  • University President (Chair)
  • Vice Presidents
  • College Deans
  • Faculty Representatives

College Deans

College Dean
College of Medicine Prof. Dr. [Name]
College of Engineering Prof. Dr. [Name]
College of Science Prof. Dr. [Name]
College of Computer Science Prof. Dr. [Name]
College of Law Prof. Dr. [Name]
College of Education Prof. Dr. [Name]

Contact Presidency

  • Email: presidency@qu.edu.iq
  • Phone: +964 780 000 0000

item.title: Lifelong Learning

Lifelong Learning

Continuous educational programs for all ages.

item.title: Mobile Apps
item.description:
Al-Qadisiyah University Apps

Al-Qadisiyah University’s official apps are available on the iOS App Store and Google Play. Students, faculty, and staff can access digital university services directly from their phones.

Available Apps

Al-Qadisiyah University Official App

The university’s primary mobile portal — includes:

  • Latest news and announcements
  • Quick access to the Student Portal (SIS)
  • Academic calendar
  • College and department information
  • Campus map
  • Contact directory

📱 Download:

  • App Store (iOS)
  • Google Play (Android)

Library App

In partnership with the Digital Library:

item.title: Multimedia
item.description:
Photo & Video Gallery

Photo Albums

Graduation Ceremony 2024

Photos from the 35th batch graduation ceremony.

International Scientific Conference

Documentation of the 12th international conference events.

Campus Tour

Photos of modern university buildings and facilities.

Student Activities

Sports, cultural, and artistic activities snapshots.

Videos

University Introduction

Comprehensive overview of Al-Qadisiyah University.

Virtual Tour

Virtually explore the university campus.

Alumni Testimonials

Graduates sharing their university experience.

Research Achievements

Video reports on major scientific achievements.

item.description:
Open Courses (MOOCs)

item.title: Organizational Structure
item.description:
University Leadership

University Presidency

  • University President: Chief executive responsible for university affairs
  • Vice President for Scientific Affairs: Overseeing academic and research matters
  • Vice President for Administrative Affairs: Overseeing administrative and financial matters

Colleges

The university includes 18 specialized colleges:

Medical and Health Colleges

  1. College of Medicine
  2. College of Dentistry
  3. College of Pharmacy
  4. College of Nursing
  5. College of Veterinary Medicine

Engineering and Science Colleges

  1. College of Engineering
  2. College of Science
  3. College of Computer Science and IT
  4. College of Agriculture
  5. College of Biotechnology

Humanities and Social Sciences Colleges

  1. College of Education
  2. College of Education for Women
  3. College of Arts
  4. College of Law
  5. College of Administration and Economics
  6. College of Fine Arts
  7. College of Physical Education and Sports Sciences
  8. College of Archaeology

Research Centers

  • Research and Studies Center
  • Computer Center
  • Continuing Education Center
  • Publishing and Documentation Center

Administrative Departments

  • Legal Affairs Department
  • Internal Audit and Control Department
  • Quality Assurance Department
  • Public Relations and Media Department
  • Student Affairs Department
  • Scholarships and Cultural Relations Department

item.title: Postgraduate Admissions
item.description:
Postgraduate Admissions

Available Programs

  • Master’s Programs
  • Doctoral Programs
  • Higher Diploma Programs

Admission Requirements

Master’s

  • Bachelor’s degree with minimum 65% average
  • Passing admission test and interview
  • English language certificate

Doctorate

  • Master’s degree with minimum 70% average
  • Preliminary research proposal
  • Academic supervisor approval

Apply

Online Application for Postgraduate Studies

Contact

  • Email: postgraduate@qu.edu.iq

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description:
Introduction

Al-Qadisiyah University is committed to protecting the privacy of its website visitors and users. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect personal information.

Information We Collect

Information You Provide

  • Name and contact details when filling out contact forms
  • Email address when subscribing to newsletters
  • Academic information when applying for admission

Automatically Collected Information

  • IP address and browser type
  • Pages visited on the website
  • Date and time of visit
  • Cookies

How We Use Information

We use collected information for the following purposes:

item.description:

item.title: Publications & Journals
item.description:
Scientific Journals

The university publishes several peer-reviewed scientific journals.

Journals

  • Al-Qadisiyah Journal for Engineering Sciences

item.title: Rankings & Accreditations
item.description:
International Rankings

Webometrics Ranking

Al-Qadisiyah University holds advanced positions in the Webometrics World Universities Ranking, which measures the digital presence and impact of universities.

Times Higher Education Ranking

The university is working to achieve an advanced position in THE ranking, which evaluates universities based on teaching, research, citations, and internationalization.

QS World Rankings

The university is working to improve its indicators to enter the QS World University Rankings.

Academic Accreditations

National Accreditation

  • Iraqi Ministry of Higher Education and Scientific Research accreditation
  • Scientific Supervision and Evaluation Authority accreditation

International Accreditations

The university is seeking international accreditations from:

item.title: Research Statistics
item.description:
Research Statistics

Indicator 2024 2023
Scopus Publications 520 450
Clarivate Publications 320 280
Patents 15 12
Citations 8,500+ 7,200+

item.title: Research Strategy
item.description:
Research Strategy

Vision

To position Al-Qadisiyah University as a distinguished research center regionally and internationally.

Objectives

  1. Increase internationally published research output
  2. Strengthen research partnerships
  3. Support researchers and fund projects
  4. Link research to community service

Research Priorities

  • Sustainable energy
  • Public health
  • Information technology
  • Agriculture and food security
  • Environment and water resources

Contact

  • research@qu.edu.iq

item.title: Scientific Journals
item.description:
University Journals

Al-Qadisiyah University publishes a set of peer-reviewed scientific journals across multiple disciplines. All journals follow Open Access principles.

📚 The full archive is available on the University Digital Repository.

Journals

Al-Qadisiyah Journal of Pure Sciences

  • Scope: Mathematics, physics, chemistry, life sciences, computer science
  • Frequency: Quarterly
  • ISSN: TODO
  • Submit: Submit a paper
  • Archive: All issues

Al-Qadisiyah Journal of Humanities

  • Scope: Literature, history, geography, philosophy, social sciences
  • Frequency: Quarterly
  • ISSN: TODO
  • Submit: Submit a paper
  • Archive: All issues

Al-Qadisiyah Journal of Engineering Sciences

  • Scope: Engineering, technology, infrastructure
  • Frequency: Bi-annual
  • ISSN: TODO
  • Submit: Submit a paper
  • Archive: All issues

Al-Qadisiyah Medical Journal

  • Scope: Human medicine, dentistry, pharmacy, nursing
  • Frequency: Quarterly
  • ISSN: TODO
  • Submit: Submit a paper
  • Archive: All issues

Editor note: Confirm the actual ISSN numbers and update the submission portal links (OJS or otherwise).

item.title: Security Policy
item.description:
Introduction

Al-Qadisiyah University is committed to providing a secure digital environment for all users. This policy outlines the security procedures and measures implemented to protect the website and data.

SSL Certificate and Encryption

  • Our website uses a valid SSL certificate to encrypt all communications
  • All transmitted data is protected with HTTPS encryption
  • HSTS policy is implemented to ensure secure connections

Attack Protection

DDoS Protection

  • Advanced protection system against denial-of-service attacks
  • Continuous monitoring of abnormal traffic

SQL Injection Protection

  • Inspection and filtering of all inputs
  • Use of parameterized queries

XSS Protection

  • Sanitization of user-submitted content
  • Content Security Policies (CSP)

Firewall

  • Web Application Firewall (WAF)
  • Blocklists for suspicious addresses
  • Monitoring and logging of intrusion attempts

Security Testing

We conduct regular security tests including:

item.title: Strategic Plan
item.description:
Strategic Plan 2024-2029

Strategic Vision

To position Al-Qadisiyah University as a leading institution regionally and internationally in education, scientific research, and community service.

Strategic Objectives

  1. Enhance Education Quality - Improve academic programs according to international standards
  2. Strengthen Research - Increase research output published in global databases
  3. Community Service - Provide programs and services that meet local community needs
  4. Digital Transformation - Develop technical infrastructure and e-services
  5. Institutional Excellence - Improve administrative performance and governance

Annual Reports

Year Report
2024-2025 Download PDF
2023-2024 Download PDF
2022-2023 Download PDF

Performance Indicators

Indicator Target Achievement
Graduate Employment Rate 80% 75%
Scopus Publications 600 520
Student Satisfaction 85% 82%

Full Strategic Plan

Download Complete Strategic Plan (PDF)

item.title: Study in Iraq
item.description:
Study in Iraq Program

Al-Qadisiyah University welcomes international students from around the world to study in its diverse academic programs.

Why Al-Qadisiyah University?

  • Quality Education: Accredited and advanced academic programs
  • Affordable Tuition: Compared to regional universities
  • Rich Cultural Environment: Opportunity to learn about Iraq’s ancient civilization
  • Strategic Location: In the heart of Iraq with easy access

Programs for International Students

Bachelor’s Programs

  • Human Medicine (6 years)
  • Dentistry (5 years)
  • Pharmacy (5 years)
  • Engineering (4 years)
  • Sciences (4 years)

Graduate Programs

  • Master’s in various disciplines
  • PhD in various disciplines

Admission Requirements

  1. High school certificate or equivalent
  2. Certificate equivalency from relevant authorities
  3. Proof of language proficiency (Arabic or English)
  4. Meeting program-specific requirements

Application Steps

  1. Online Registration: Through Study in Iraq website
  2. Upload Documents: Required certificates and documents
  3. Pay Application Fee: Through electronic portal
  4. Await Admission: Application review and results announcement
  5. Visa Issuance: After final admission

Costs and Fees

Fees vary by program and specialization. For detailed fees:

item.title: Training Schedule
item.description:
Upcoming Training Courses

The Continuing Education Centre at Al-Qadisiyah University organises monthly training courses and qualifying workshops for academics, professionals, and the local community.

⚠️ Editor note: This schedule must be refreshed monthly.

Current Schedule

Title Duration Start Date Location Registration
TODO TODO TODO TODO Register
TODO TODO TODO TODO Register
TODO TODO TODO TODO Register

Programme Types

  • Professional qualifying programmes — certificates in project management, data analysis, IT
  • Language courses — English, Turkish, French at various levels
  • Pedagogical courses — teaching-skills development for faculty
  • Free qualifying workshops for students — CV and job-interview skills

Contact

  • 📧 Email: ce@qu.edu.iq
  • 📞 Phone: TODO
  • 🌐 Centre page: /en/campus/continuing-education/

Related

  • Certificates & Qualification
  • MOOCs
  • Lifelong Learning

item.title: Undergraduate Admissions
item.description:
Undergraduate Admissions (Bachelor’s)

Available Colleges

The university includes 18 colleges offering bachelor’s programs in various specializations.

Admission Requirements

  • Iraqi Preparatory Certificate or equivalent
  • Meeting the required average for the college
  • Passing medical examination (for health colleges)

Application Steps

  1. Register with Centralized Admission Department
  2. Select preferences by priority
  3. Follow admission results
  4. Complete registration procedures

Learn More

  • Detailed Admission Requirements
  • Admission Plans

item.title: University Statistics
item.description:
Overview

Al-Qadisiyah University was founded in 1987 and is today one of Iraq’s leading public universities. This page presents cumulative and annual statistics, updated yearly.

Key Figures

Indicator Count
Colleges 18
Academic Departments ~110
Research Centres 4 main centres
Faculty Members ~2,400 (professors, lecturers, assistant lecturers, instructors)
Enrolled Students ~35,000 (undergraduate + postgraduate)
Administrative Staff ~1,800
Scientific Publications (Scopus, cumulative) Updated annually — see Research Statistics
Patents Updated annually — see Patents

Editor note: Refresh the numbers above annually from the deanship and statistics office reports. Last updated: TODO.

item.title: Vision, Mission & Goals
item.description:
Vision

To be a regionally pioneering and internationally recognized university in higher education, scientific research, and community service.

Mission

Al-Qadisiyah University is committed to providing distinguished academic education and preparing qualified and specialized cadres through:

  • Providing a stimulating educational environment for creativity and innovation
  • Enhancing scientific research aimed at solving community problems
  • Instilling ethical and national values in students
  • Building effective partnerships with local and international institutions

Strategic Goals

1. Academic Excellence

  • Developing academic programs according to international standards
  • Recruiting distinguished scientific competencies
  • Providing modern and advanced learning resources

2. Scientific Research

  • Supporting original and applied scientific research
  • Encouraging publication in prestigious scientific journals
  • Establishing specialized research centers

3. Community Service

  • Providing consultations and services to public and private sectors
  • Organizing continuing education and training programs
  • Contributing to solving societal problems

4. Digital Transformation

  • Digitizing administrative and academic processes
  • Developing e-learning platforms
  • Enhancing technological infrastructure

5. International Cooperation

  • Expanding partnerships with global universities
  • Exchanging academic and research experiences
  • Participating in international conferences and events

Core Values

  • Integrity: Commitment to the highest standards of ethics and transparency
  • Excellence: Continuous pursuit of quality and mastery
  • Innovation: Encouraging creativity and critical thinking
  • Collaboration: Working in team spirit and partnership
  • Responsibility: Commitment to community and nation
